---
title: "‘A Household Record’"
---

## ‘A Household Record’

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1857
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> 13 (June 1857) 561-624.

### Notes

Reprinted in <i>Lucy and Christian Wainwright and other stories</i> (1863) with that story, ‘Some Thorns and Roses from a Homely Life’, ‘Bygone Days’, ‘The Two Beauties’, ‘Will No One do Likewise?’ and ‘The Lost are Found’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
